changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE technology_assets ( id serial NOT NULL, organization_id integer NULL, technology_asset_status systemstatus NULL DEFAULT 'ACTIVE'::systemstatus, "name" varchar(255) NOT NULL DEFAULT ''::character varying, description text NULL, owner_id integer NULL, infosec_focal_person_id integer NULL, business_unit_id integer NULL, technology_category_id integer NULL, technology_subcategory_id integer NULL, technology_class_type_id integer NULL, technology_id integer NULL, manufacturer_id integer NULL, number_of_rec_processed float8 NULL, created_by_id integer NULL, updated_by_id integer NULL, created_at timestamp NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at timestamp NULL DEFAULT now(), is_ma_asset bool NULL DEFAULT false, is_etl bool NULL DEFAULT false, rto float8 NULL, rpo float8 NULL, cost_to_restore float8 NULL, technology_asset_type systemtype NULL, version_number varchar(255) NULL DEFAULT NULL::character varying, deployment_type deploymenttype NULL, os_name varchar(255) NULL DEFAULT NULL::character varying, serial_number varchar(255) NULL DEFAULT NULL::character varying, eol_date timestamp NULL, warranty_expiration timestamp NULL, asset_name varchar(255) NULL DEFAULT NULL::character varying, ip_address varchar(64) NULL DEFAULT NULL::character varying, asset_domain_function varchar(64) NULL DEFAULT NULL::character varying, discovery_source varchar(127) NULL DEFAULT NULL::character varying, device_id varchar(127) NULL DEFAULT NULL::character varying, hardware_substatus varchar(64) NULL DEFAULT NULL::character varying, owner_type varchar(127) NULL DEFAULT NULL::character varying, "location" varchar(127) NULL DEFAULT NULL::character varying, CONSTRAINT pk_technology_assets PRIMARY KEY (id), CONSTRAINT fk_technology_assets_to_business_unit FOREIGN KEY (business_unit_id) REFERENCES business_units(id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT fk_technology_assets_to_created_by FOREIGN KEY (created_by_id) REFERENCES users(id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL, CONSTRAINT fk_technology_assets_to_technology_category FOREIGN KEY (technology_category_id) REFERENCES technology_categories(id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL, CONSTRAINT fk_technology_assets_to_technology_subcategory FOREIGN KEY (technology_subcategory_id) REFERENCES technology_subcategories(id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL, CONSTRAINT fk_technology_assets_to_technology_class_type FOREIGN KEY (technology_class_type_id) REFERENCES technology_class_types(id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL, CONSTRAINT fk_technology_assets_to_technology FOREIGN KEY (technology_id) REFERENCES technologies(id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL, CONSTRAINT fk_technology_assets_to_infosec_focal_person_id FOREIGN KEY (infosec_focal_person_id) REFERENCES users(id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL, CONSTRAINT fk_technology_assets_to_manufacturer FOREIGN KEY (manufacturer_id) REFERENCES organizations(id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT fk_technology_assets_to_organization FOREIGN KEY (organization_id) REFERENCES organizations(id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT fk_technology_assets_to_owner_id FOREIGN KEY (owner_id) REFERENCES users(id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL, CONSTRAINT fk_technology_assets_to_updated_by FOREIGN KEY (updated_by_id) REFERENCES users(id) MATCH SIMPLE ON UPDATE CASCADE ON DELETE SET NULL ); CREATE INDEX i_technology_assets_business_unit ON technology_assets USING btree (business_unit_id); CREATE INDEX i_technology_assets_technology_category ON technology_assets USING btree (technology_category_id); CREATE INDEX i_technology_assets_technology_subcategory ON technology_assets USING btree (technology_subcategory_id); CREATE INDEX i_technology_assets_technology_class_type ON technology_assets USING btree (technology_class_type_id); CREATE INDEX i_technology_assets_technology ON technology_assets USING btree (technology_id); CREATE INDEX i_technology_assets_infosec_focal_person ON technology_assets USING btree (infosec_focal_person_id); CREATE INDEX i_technology_assets_name ON technology_assets USING btree (name); CREATE INDEX i_technology_assets_manufacturer ON technology_assets USING btree (manufacturer_id); CREATE INDEX i_technology_assets_organization ON technology_assets USING btree (organization_id); CREATE INDEX i_technology_assets_organization_id_name ON technology_assets USING btree (organization_id, name); CREATE INDEX i_technology_assets_owner ON technology_assets USING btree (owner_id);
